pairs.ai: yes, green is a color.
yes, blue is a color. it is located between green and violet on the visible light spectrum and is often associated with the sky and ocean.
grass is usually green.
the sky often looks blue during the day.
yes, a dog is an animal.
yes, a cat is an animal.
a bird is an animal with feathers and wings.
a fish is an animal that lives in water.
the sun is a star at the center of our solar system.
the moon is earth's natural satellite.
a planet is a large object that orbits a star.
yes, earth is a planet.
water is a liquid that people, animals, and plants need to live.
fire is heat, light, and burning caused by combustion.
air is the mixture of gases around us that we breathe.
food gives living things energy and nutrients.
yes, ice is cold.
yes, fire is hot.
yes, the sun is very hot.
yes, snow is cold.
rain is water that falls from clouds.
wind is moving air.
weather is what the air and sky are like at a certain time and place.
a cloud is a collection of tiny water droplets or ice crystals in the sky.
a tree is a tall plant with a trunk and branches.
a flower is the colorful part of a plant that makes seeds.
a mountain is a large landform that rises above the surrounding land.
a river is a flowing body of water that usually goes to the ocean.
an ocean is a large body of salt water that covers most of the earth.
